arts.ttl: WATCH: Barcelona double their lead against Osasuna as Dani Olmo scores
arts.sum: Barcelona are well on course to record another La Liga victory after doubling their lead over Osasuna in their rearranged fixture at the Estadi Olimpic Lluis Companys. It took only 11 minutes for Barcelona to break the deadlock against Osasuna, and it has come from Ferran Torres. arts.ttl: WATCH: Barcelona take early lead against Osasuna as Ferran Torres strikes
arts.sum: Barcelona can move three points clear at the top of La Liga with victory over Osasuna, and they are on course to achieve this after scoring an early goal in their clash at the Estadi Olimpic Lluis Companys. arts.ttl: Flick reveals why he called up Araujo and offers Raphinha update
arts.sum: Flick had previously said that Araujo and Raphinha were out of the squad for the match due to their international commitments. Barcelona boss Hansi Flick has revealed why he opted to call up Ronald Araujo to his squad for Thursday’s game against Osasuna.

arts.ttl: Team News: Robert Lewandowski decision made as Hansi Flick confirms Barcelona XI for controversial Osasuna fixture
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick confirms his starting XI for Thursday's La Liga clash with Osasuna, with a decision on Robert Lewandowski's involvement being made.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick aims dig at Real Madrid over schedule complaints
arts.sum: Hansi Flick aims a dig at Real Madrid ahead of Barcelona's La Liga clash with Osasuna.

arts.ttl: Barcelona vs Osasuna LIVE: La Liga match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction
arts.sum: Hansi Flick’s side are bidding to open up a lead over Real Madrid at the top of La Liga

arts.ttl: Possible Barcelona lineup for Osasuna clash with Gavi set for return
arts.sum: Polish veteran keeper Wojciech Szczesny will start in goal, while Íñigo Martínez, who has recovered from the problems with his right knee that prevented him from playing for the national team, and Eric García will be in central defence flanked by Jules Kundé and Alejandro Balde. Pedri and De Jong are both tipped to start, with Robert Lewandowski, Lamine and Ferran Torres set to be the attacking trident with the Polish striker looking to avail of the game in hand to pull away from Kylian Mbappé in the race for the ‘pichichi’ (top scorer), the Barça striker has found the target 22 times this season compared to the French striker’s tally of 20.

arts.ttl: How to watch Barcelona vs Osasuna in UK: Live stream, TV channel and team news for rearranged La Liga clash
arts.sum: The two Spanish sides have been forced to play during the international break after their previous date was cancelled

arts.ttl: Barcelona preparing contract offer for Premier League transfer target
arts.sum: Barcelona are set to offer Ferran Torres a new contract in the face of Premier League transfer interest.

arts.ttl: Taylor Swift set to declare her allegiance to Barcelona over Real Madrid
arts.sum: These shirts have sold at incredibly high prices and been hugely popular with fans across the world, as well as presumably bringing in a lot of money with the deal itself. The news of Swift on the red and blue shirt might come as something of a surprise to Real Madrid fans, who were in their typically huge numbers when Taylor Swift played two consecutive nights at the Estadio Santiago Bernabéu last year .
